Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

twostraindengue 0.0.0.9000

  • Bootstrapped package-oriented repository structure.
  • Moved analysis outputs into timestamped outputs/ subdirectories.
  • Added initial test scaffolding and CI/CD placeholders.
  • Switched package documentation maintenance to roxygen2-generated man/ and NAMESPACE outputs.
  • Expanded CI workflows for multi-platform R CMD check, coverage reporting, and pkgdown site builds.
  • Added lightweight examples, vignettes, and tests for the packaged Hermosillo 2010 workflow.

Developed by Manuel Cota.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
